rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/conceptual synthesis that reviews many prior and special-issue papers and classifies them in a table, so an individual citation may be either substantive or simply part of a literature map. For this pair, the matched evidence is only a single DOI reference entry (no in-text citation context or quoted usage). Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only, but there is not enough to clearly keep.
